category_sources: Official Idris homepage says Idris is a programming language for Type-Driven Development.
Official Idris2 repository describes it as a purely functional programming language with first class types.
source_facts.description says Idris 2 is a pure functional programming language with dependent types.
docs_sources: Official Idris homepage links to Documentation from the main navigation.
Official Idris2 repository links to `Official documentation` on Read the Docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value `https://github.com/idris-lang/Idris2`; per instruction, repo returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official Idris homepage explains type-driven development and first-class types.
Official Idris2 README topics include dependent-types and compiler.
source_facts.description identifies a pure functional language with dependent types.
